data.title: MercadoLibre Poised For 30% Upside As Gross Merchandise Value And Payment Volume Surge, Says Goldman Sachs
data.description: MercadoLibre is set to report its Q3 2024 earnings in late October or early November. Analysts predict an adjusted EPS of $10.55 and revenues of $5.25 billion, driven by robust gross merchandise value growth in Brazil and Mexico. Goldman Sachs maintains a Buy rating with a price target of $2,620.

data.title: L3Harris Analyst Sees 'Turning Point' For Growth, Attractive Valuation Driving Outperformance
data.description: L3Harris Technologies Inc. (NYSE: LHX) received a notable upgrade on Thursday from Wolfe Research analyst Myles Walton, who moved the stock from Peer Perform to Outperform and set a new price target of $300. The target suggests a potential upside of nearly 24%.

data.title: FIFA Partners With Konami For eFootball FIFAe World Cup Revival
data.description: FIFA teams up with Konami for the FIFAe World Cup, featuring eFootball in a global esports event. Qualifying starts today.

data.title: What Happened With Jet.AI Stock Today?
data.description: Jet.AI shares fell Thursday after the company announced that it has entered into an agreement with certain institutional investors to purchase approximately 26.6 million shares of common stock in a registered direct offering.
